message:
feat(mux): add transfer resume support and OPFS cache management UI

Transfer resume: server preserves transfer session state on file WS
disconnect, client tracks interrupted uploads and auto-resumes on
reconnect via extended TRANSFER_READY (25-byte format with resume
position). Server handles TRANSFER_RESUME (0x23) to restore sessions.

OPFS cache management: add Storage menu item under File menu to show
cache usage (file count, total size) and clear all cached files.
Worker implements recursive directory walk for usage calculation and
full cache directory removal for cleanup.
